events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Cyndi Lauper, known for hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: It's Cyndi Lauper's birthday! Which of her iconic tracks always gets you on the dance floor?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the incredibly talented George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today. He passed away in 2016.

angles.name: A True Icon
angles.copy: Thinking of the legendary George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday. His music continues to inspire generations.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the world lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who passed away on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost an icon. Michael Jackson's music and artistry remain unmatched.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Peace and Love
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his distinctive drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! His guitar riffs are truly out of this world.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young! Wishing a very happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. Still got those moves!

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV hit our screens with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it really kill the radio star? We think not!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which celebrates its 32nd anniversary this month.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in time.

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: On this day, we pay tribute to Elvis Presley, 49 years after his passing. His music lives on forever.

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who passed away on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Legendary Impact
angles.copy: Thirty years on, Tupac Shakur's impact on music and culture is still felt deeply. A true legend never dies.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Remembering guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago, we lost a true guitar genius. Jimi Hendrix's electrifying legacy continues to inspire.

events.title: 57 years since The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' release
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that unforgettable zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years of 'Abbey Road'. The music is timeless, and that album cover? Pure legend.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The trailblazing frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Rebel
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock and roll rebel who continues to inspire.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Britpop icon and former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that pure rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' single re-release
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem for peace, 'Imagine', was re-released as a single in the UK on October 24, 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since the UK single re-release of John Lennon's 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates deeply today.

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod was unveiled
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Music In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember when 1,000 songs in your pocket was groundbreaking? It's been 25 years since Apple unveiled the first iPod!

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today. He passed away in 1980.

angles.name: Imagine A Legend
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the enduring legacy of John Lennon. His vision for peace continues to inspire.
